verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Take my life I lay it down At the cross where I am found All I have I give to You oh God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Take my hands and make them clean Keep my heart in purity That I may walk in all You have for me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh here I stand Arms open wide Oh I am Yours And You are mine

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Take my moments and my days Let each breath that I take Be ever only for You oh God

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: My whole life is Yours I give it all Surrendered to Your Name And forever I will pray Have Your way Have Your way
